sections.title: Layer 2 — The Physical-Theological Mathematics
sections.text:
**The Bridge. Where each formal factor maps to a physical law and a spiritual law.**
**POF 2828 | May 2, 2026 | Source: Canonical April 16 doc + Definition 10 + Wolfram + GPT verification**
---

sections.title: What This Layer Is
sections.text:
This layer takes the ten formal factors from Layer 1 (`G M E S T K R Q F C`) and gives each one **two readings**:
- A **physical law-form** — the standard physics equation that operationalizes that factor
- A **spiritual law-form** — the structurally isomorphic equation that operationalizes the same factor in moral / theological space
Both forms share the same mathematical structure. That is the no-drift claim: the equation is invariant under domain relabeling. Same algebra, two interpretations.
This layer is what you write papers from. It is what you publish. It is what survives a hostile physicist's review and a serious theologian's review, because it shows the math both ways without collapsing them.
---

sections.title: The Ten-Row Table
sections.text:
### Factor 1 — G — External Negentropy Influx / Grace
**Formal:** `G(x, t) ∈ ℝ≥0`
**Physical law-form:**
```
dχ/dt = F(χ, S) + G(t)
```
Coherence requires external negentropy. Closed systems decay; open systems with influx can maintain or grow coherence.
**Spiritual law-form:**
```
dχ_ψ/dt = F_ψ(χ_ψ, S_ψ) + α(s) · G_grace(t)
```
Spiritual coherence requires grace received through alignment. α(s) is the reception coefficient — grace is offered, but reception depends on the alignment state s ∈ {-1, 0, +1}.
**Plain meaning:** Physical coherence cannot be self-sufficient; it requires external negentropy. Spiritual coherence cannot be self-sufficient; it requires grace, and the soul's alignment determines how much is received.
---

sections.title: Factor 2 — M — Alignment Cosine / Moral Alignment
sections.text:
**Formal:** `M(x, t) = ⟨v_S(x,t), v_ref(x,t)⟩ / (‖v_S‖ · ‖v_ref‖) ∈ [-1, 1]`
**Physical law-form:**
```
cos θ = (a · b) / (‖a‖ · ‖b‖)
```
The alignment of two vectors. Maximum coupling when parallel; zero coupling when perpendicular; maximum opposition when antiparallel.
**Spiritual law-form:**
```
M_ψ = ⟨ψ, Λ⟩ / (‖ψ‖ · ‖Λ‖)
```
Where ψ is the soul / system state and Λ is the Logos / reference vector.
**Plain meaning:** Physical alignment measures vector agreement. Spiritual alignment measures agreement between the soul-state and the Logos. M = 1 is full alignment; M = 0 is orthogonal indifference; M = -1 is direct opposition.
---

sections.title: Factor 3 — E — Signal Propagation Fidelity / Truth Transmission
sections.text:
**Formal:** `E(x, t) ∈ ℝ≥0`
**Physical law-form (Shannon):**
```
C_channel = B · log₂(1 + S/N)
```
Channel capacity grows with bandwidth and signal-to-noise ratio. Higher noise reduces effective information transmission.
**Spiritual law-form:**
```
C_truth = B_ψ · log₂(1 + T/N_ψ) · A
```
Where T = truth signal, N_ψ = soul-noise (sin, distortion), A = acceptance / receptivity coefficient.
**Plain meaning:** Physical information transmission depends on signal-to-noise. Spiritual truth transmission depends on truth-to-noise and the receiver's openness. Both fail when noise overwhelms signal.
---

sections.title: Factor 4 — S — Entropy Production / Disorder Accumulation
sections.text:
**Formal raw:** `S_prod(x, t) ∈ ℝ≥0`
**Formal effective (used in product):** `S_eff(x, t) = e^(-η · S_prod) ∈ (0, 1]`
**Physical law-form (Second Law):**
```
dS_thermo/dt = σ ≥ 0
```
Entropy production is non-negative in closed systems. Disorder accumulates without external work.
**Spiritual law-form (Moral Second Law):**
```
dS_moral/dt = σ_sin - W_grace/T
```
Spiritual disorder accumulates from sin (σ_sin) and is reduced by grace-as-work (W_grace) at temperature T. Without external grace, moral entropy strictly increases.
**Plain meaning:** Closed physical systems decay thermodynamically. Closed moral systems decay morally. The same equation governs both. Grace is the external work term that keeps the system from heat death.
---

sections.title: Factor 5 — T — Temporal Integration / Consequence Over Time
sections.text:
**Formal:** `T(x, t) ∈ ℝ>0`
**Physical law-form (Action):**
```
A[t₀, t₁] = ∫_{t₀}^{t₁} L(q, q̇, t) dt
```
Action integrates Lagrangian over time. The path actually taken minimizes (or extremizes) action.
**Spiritual law-form:**
```
C_ψ[t₀, t₁] = ∫_{t₀}^{t₁} L_ψ(ψ, ψ̇, t) dt
```
Consequence integrates moral state over time. Choices accumulate. Time turns possibility into history.
**Plain meaning:** Physical action is the integrated cost of motion through time. Spiritual consequence is the integrated cost of moral motion through time. Both make decisions irreversible.
---

sections.title: Factor 6 — K — Compression / Logos Information Density
sections.text:
**Formal:** `K(x, t) ∈ ℝ≥0`
**Physical law-form (Kolmogorov):**
```
K_ratio(x) = K_Kol(x) / |x|
```

sections.title: Or via information content:
sections.text:
```
I(x) = -log p(x)
```
A string is compressible to the extent it carries structure. Random noise is incompressible; ordered patterns compress dramatically.
**Spiritual law-form:**
```
K_Logos(ψ) = Meaning(ψ) / DescriptionLength(ψ)
```
Logos compresses meaning into structure. The shortest description that carries the full meaning is the most Logos-aligned.
**Plain meaning:** Physical compression measures how much structure is carried in shorter form. Spiritual Logos-compression measures how much meaning is carried in compact form. The Word made flesh — maximum meaning in minimum form.
---

sections.title: Factor 7 — R — Irreversible Phase Transition / Consequence Lock
sections.text:
**Formal:** `R(x, t) = 𝟙[χ(x, t) ≥ θ] ∈ {0, 1}`
**Physical law-form:**
```
R_phase = 𝟙[p ≥ p_c]
```
A phase transition fires when the order parameter crosses the critical threshold. Below p_c the system is in one phase; at or above p_c it has irreversibly transitioned.
**Spiritual law-form:**
```
R_ψ = 𝟙[χ_ψ ≥ θ_ψ]
```
A spiritual phase transition fires when coherence crosses a threshold. Conversion. Repentance. Hardening. Once crossed, the state change is irreversible without external grace.
**Plain meaning:** Physical phase transitions are sharp and irreversible (you can't un-boil an egg). Spiritual phase transitions are sharp and irreversible (Heb 6:4-6 makes this explicit at one direction). The threshold is real; crossing it locks the state.
---

sections.title: Factor 8 — Q — Superposition / Unresolved Possibility
sections.text:
**Formal:** `Q(x, t) ∈ [0, 1]`
**Physical law-form (quantum):**
```
|Ψ⟩ = Σᵢ αᵢ |i⟩ with Σᵢ |αᵢ|² = 1
```

sections.title: A simple measure of unresolved-ness:
sections.text:
```
Q = 1 - max_i |αᵢ|²
```
Q = 0 means a single eigenstate is fully selected; Q approaches 1 as superposition spreads across many states.
**Spiritual law-form:**
```
|Ψ_ψ⟩ = Σᵢ αᵢ |choice_i⟩
Q_ψ = 1 - max_i |αᵢ|²
```
The soul carries unresolved possible choices in superposition until commitment / faith / observation collapses to one.
**Plain meaning:** Physical quantum systems carry unresolved possibilities until measurement. Spiritual agency carries unresolved possible choices until commitment. Faith is the collapse operator.
---

sections.title: Factor 9 — F — Non-Local Correlation / Faith-Bond / Entanglement
sections.text:
**Formal:** `F(x, t) ∈ [0, 1]`
**Physical law-form (mutual information / entanglement):**
```
F_AB = I(A : B) / min(H(A), H(B))
```

sections.title: Or for entanglement entropy:
sections.text:
```
F_AB = S(ρ_A) = -Tr(ρ_A · log ρ_A)
```
Non-local correlation between subsystems.
**Spiritual law-form:**
```
F_ψ = I(ψ_A : ψ_B) / min(H(ψ_A), H(ψ_B))
```
Non-local relational participation. Bond between souls. Communion.
**Plain meaning:** Physical entanglement measures non-local correlation; once entangled, two systems are no longer independent. Spiritual faith-bond is the same structure: covenant, communion, mystical union. The bond is real and non-local.
---

sections.title: Factor 10 — C — Total Integration / Coherence / Christ
sections.text:
**Formal:** `C(x, t) ∈ [0, 1]`
**Physical law-form:**
```
C = I_integrated / I_total
```

sections.title: Or:
sections.text:
```
C = 1 - H_fragmented / H_max
```
Total integration of subsystem information. The whole exceeds the parts.
**Spiritual law-form:**
```
C_ψ = I_communion / I_total
```
Union under Christ / Logos. The integrating principle.
**Plain meaning:** Physical coherence measures integrated unity — how much the system functions as one. Spiritual coherence measures union under Christ / Logos. C is the integrator at the local level. χ is what emerges when C and the other nine factors are integrated over space and time.
---

sections.title: The Master Equation (corrected)
sections.text:
```
┌─ t₁ ┌─
χ_total = │ │ G · M · E · S_eff · T · K · R · Q · F · C d³x dt
┘ t₀ ┘ Ω
```

sections.title: With:
sections.text:
```
S_eff = e^(-η · S_prod)
```
Both readings — physical and spiritual — share this exact algebraic form. That is the isomorphism claim.
---

sections.title: What This Layer Is Not
sections.text:
- **Not the formal layer.** Definition 10 (Layer 1) defines what the variables ARE as typed objects. This layer defines what they MEAN in physical and spiritual interpretations. Layer 1 is the spine; Layer 2 is the muscle.
- **Not the teaching layer.** This layer is rigorous but dense. Public communication (Substack, TikTok, articles) lives in Layer 3. There the language gets compressed and made human-accessible.
- **Not yet a proof.** The isomorphism claim — that physical and spiritual readings share algebraic form — is the structural assertion of Theophysics. Each row in this table is an instance. Whether the framework is *true* depends on whether each row holds under hostile review and empirical test.
---

sections.title: The Two Asymmetries
sections.text:
The framework is **almost** fully symmetric across all ten factors, but two factors break the symmetry intentionally:
**Factor 9 (F — Weak Force / Sin / Moral Conservation) is directional.** It does not have a symmetric constructive/destructive duality inside the same equation the way Laws 1-8 do. It tracks irreversible directional decay with a three-body conservation structure (ψ_whole → ψ_broken + δ + ν_loss). The atonement enters as an external source term that closes the ledger.
**Factor 10 (C — Coherence / Christ) is the integrator with no internal partner.** Decoherence is parasitic, not primary; coherence is sovereign. C IS χ at the local level, not a subsystem of χ.
These two asymmetries are load-bearing. They are not bugs in the symmetry; they are where the framework points to something irreducible.
---
*Source: Canonical April 16 doc (NO_DRIFT_CANONICAL_LAWS.md) merged with Definition 10 typed factors and the corrected entropy sign repair*
*Verified by GPT (May 2, 2026) and structurally encoded in Lean 4 companion kernel*
*Status: PROPOSED CANONICAL — addendum to April 16 doc, ready for review*
